## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new hires and provide an overview of GrowthX's operations, processes, and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown rapidly to 25 customers and $3M ARR in \~7 months, driven by AI-powered content creation and SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [The company uses Notion as its central knowledge base and Slack for day-to-day communication](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [New hires are encouraged to document processes, provide feedback, and help improve onboarding for future team members](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [GrowthX offers various work streams, with most starting at $9,000/month for 50-100k words of content](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Marcel built content engines at previous companies, generating significant ROI](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Started GrowthX as a side project, quickly gained traction after workshops](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Grew from 0 to $3M ARR (\~$250k/month) in about 7 months](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Now at 25 customers, with more demand than current capacity](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Leadership team: Marcel, Kyle, Jimmy - oversee account strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Managing Editors (new hires) - will own account management and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Daniel (CTO) - improving workflows, building internal tools](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
  - [Hiring sales leader and more engineers](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)

### Tools and Systems

  - [Primary tools: Notion, Slack, AirOps, Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2721.0)
  - [Moving passwords to 1Password for better security](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)
  - [Creating Slack channels for each client (internal and external)](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)

### Work Streams and Pricing

  - [Main work streams: AI-Powered Content Creation, Programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Most engagements start at $9,000/month, some range from $4,000-$7,000](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Larger engagements (e.g., DataGrid at $39,000/month) combine multiple work streams](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Upsells include AI-powered link building ($6-7,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### Client Management

  - [Each client has a dedicated Notion workspace](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [First 12 weeks of engagement are crucial, with specific deliverables each week](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Aiming for 50-100k words of content per month for full-scope clients](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

### Company Culture and Values

  - [Emphasis on communication, documentation, and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [Encourage thinking like owners and taking extreme ownership](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [Focus on workflows and processes before technology](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)

## Next Steps

  - [New hires to review onboarding materials, including Cohort 3 recording](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Watch client kickoff meetings and sales calls for context](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Provide feedback on onboarding process and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)
  - [Gradually ramp up involvement in client accounts over the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [Connect with Wiets for access to remaining tools and systems](https://fathom.video/share/gSXAFXYw_yiugUJ5-Sx6a29BVzGhq6Nx?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
